title: Dynamic View
description: Dynamic View is a mod which automatically changes the player's camera perspective in configurable contexts.
body:
Dynamic View is a Fabric and NeoForge mod which automatically changes the player's camera perspective. It has configurable contexts including:
- Swimming
- Crawling
- Flying (Elytra)
- Riding (Boats, Horses, etc.)

When the camera perspective changes, there is a smooth animation to ease in and out. This can also be configured in the mod config.
